summary: Iteration 2: Validated Scenes 4 (Soru) and 5 (Belgisiz) added on top of existing 3-scene MVP. Backend pytest (11/11 pass) extended to assert scene_4 + scene_5 persistence and teacher_stats keys. Full E2E Playwright run pre-seeded scenes 1-3 via API, then drove Scene 4 phase 1 (5 adj tokens) + phase 2 (3 sentences) + Scene 5 phase 1 (4 adj tokens) + phase 2 (3 sentences) ending in GameSummary. Achieved perfect 36/36 score; session persisted with all 5 scenes + completed_at; Teacher Dashboard shows S4 + S5 columns and 5 scene cards; Landing shows '5 sahnelik'.
critical_code_review_comments: SceneUpdate.scene comment in server.py still says '"scene_1", "scene_2", "scene_3"' — update to reflect scene_4/scene_5 are now also valid (purely cosmetic).
server.py still uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to lifespan handler at next major refactor (non-blocking).

IdentifyScene submitSentence uses spread of sentenceResults to compute final totals; works because state is appended synchronously, but using a useRef or reducer pattern would be more defensive against React 18 batching edge cases.

TeacherDashboard scene-card grid uses lg:grid-cols-5 — looks fine on desktop (verified). On md it falls back to 3 columns which leaves an asymmetric last row of 2; consider md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-5 or accept as-is.
No data-testid on individual scene-cards in TeacherDashboard; would aid future regression tests.
seed_data_creation: TEST_E2E_S45 (class TEST_6B) session created via API + completed via UI for full 36/36 score. Earlier TEST_Ogrenci sessions remain from pytest runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 fully verified all 5 scenes + dashboard updates. Useful pattern for fast E2E: pre-seed scenes 1-3 via PUT /api/sessions/{id}/scene then navigate /oyun/{id} — Game.jsx auto-jumps to first incomplete scene. Scene4/5 testids: scene4-scene, scene4-adj-{Hangi|Kaç|Kaçıncı|Ne|Nasıl}, scene4-check-btn, scene4-continue-btn, scene4-p2-word-{Hangi|Kaç|Nasıl}, scene4-submit-sentence-btn (mirror for scene5 with Bazı/Birkaç/Hiçbir/Tüm in P1 and Her/Birçok/Bütün in P2). Perfect run = 9+4+8+8+7 = 36. summary-row-scene_{1..5} are present in GameSummary. Teacher dashboard table columns include S1..S5; scene cards show Niteleme/İşaret/Sayı/Soru/Belgisiz.
